name: @tishlang/tish-syntax-highlight
description: Pure Tish fenced-code syntax highlighting (hljs-style spans, no external deps)

scripts.build: tish build --target js --no-optimize src/main.tish -o dist/tish-syntax-highlight.js && TISH_EXPORT_OUT=dist/tish-syntax-highlight.js TISH_EXPORT_NAMES=highlightCodeToHtml,defaultSyntaxHighlightCss node scripts/append-exports.mjs
